class.name: ASEffect
class.brief_description: Resource defining modifications to attributes and tags.
class.description: [ASEffect] defines a package of attribute modifiers and tags. Can be instant, have a duration, or be infinite.

method.name: get_modifier_attribute
method.description: Returns the name of the attribute targeted by a modifier at a given index.

method.name: get_modifier_count
method.description: Returns the number of modifiers defined in this effect.

method.name: get_modifier_magnitude
method.description: Returns the base magnitude of a specific modifier by its index.

method.name: get_modifier_operation
method.description: Returns the mathematical operation of a specific modifier.

method.name: get_requirement_amount
method.description: Returns the amount for the specified requirement.

method.name: get_requirement_attribute
method.description: Returns the attribute for the specified requirement.

method.name: is_modifier_custom
method.description: Returns true if the specified modifier uses custom calculation logic.

members.member: Effect cannot be applied if the target has [b]all[/b] of these tags simultaneously (AND logic).
Effect cannot be applied if the target has [b]any[/b] of these tags (OR logic).
Effect requires the target to have [b]all[/b] of these tags to be applied (AND logic).
Effect requires the target to have [b]at least one[/b] of these tags to be applied (OR logic).
Tags that dictate whether this effect is blocked from applying.
Visual and Audio Cues emitted by this effect.
Base duration value.
INSTANT (0), DURATION (1), INFINITE (2).
Unique name for the effect.
Tag identifying this effect.
Events dispatched when this effect is successfully applied to a target.
Events dispatched when this effect is removed from a target.
If true, the periodic effect triggers immediately upon application instead of waiting for the first period to elapse.
Tags granted while effect is active.
The number of attribute modifiers in this effect package.
The time in seconds between periodic applications. Only used if duration_policy is DURATION or INFINITE.
Tags corresponding to effects that should be removed when this effect applies.
The number of attribute requirements needed to apply this effect.
Policy determining how new applications stack with existing instances of the same effect tag.
Defines whether the effect applies to the owner (Self) or should be passed to other targets (Others).
If true, duration is calculated via ASC callback (index -1).

constants.constant: Effect is applied once and removed immediately.
Effect lasts for a specified duration.
New application replaces the old (resets timer).
Effect is applied to the component that originated it.
Effect is intended to be applied to other components (e.g., via projectiles or area attacks).
Adds the magnitude to the attribute.
Multiplies the attribute by the magnitude.
Divides the attribute by the magnitude.
Overrides the attribute with the magnitude.
